MINI MINUTES:

Appearances
Wallace Doolittle, ESQ, of Doolittle Law Tel: 510-374-6353 for plaintiff/cross defendant.(via Zoom Conference)
Steven L. Robinson, ESQ. of THE LAW OFFICES OF JOSEPH L. ALIOTO & ANGELA ALIOTO Tel:(415) 434-8700 for Defendant/Cross Complainant Gian Paolo Veronese.

Hearing is held. Defendant/Cross Complainant counsel contests the tentative ruling regarding 1.Recovery of attorney fees not incurred by Harden but by Highland Canopy ($ 21,778) not a party to the motion; and 2. Double Billing for the same legal work. The matter argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Cross-defendants Mike Harden, Sonoma Hills Farms and The Highland Company's Motion For Attorneys' Fees And Costs is taken under submission.

Proposed Order Submitted.

CROSS-DEFENDANT THE HIGHLAND CANOPY LLC'S Petition To Compel Arbitration Of Cross-Complaint, And To Stay Further Proceedings On Cross-Complaint:

Cross defendant's (THE HIGHLAND CANOPY LLC) unopposed motion to compel arbitration of the cross-complaint and stay litigation of that pleading is granted.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration [Ccp 1281.2]
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James Downs, Esq. (415.568.2249; jdowns@doolittlelaw.com) of Law Offices of Wallace D. Doolittle for Plaintiff via Zoom video conference.
Michael Dillingham, Esq. (415.531-3644; mike@epperlyelam.com) of Epperly Elam Fuochi for cross-defendant The Highland Canopy LLC via Zoom video conference.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
